name: Text
description: Text: renders a string of text with word-wrapping, alignment, and scrolling

api.signature: new Text(content: string, style: Partial<Style> = {}, props: Partial<TextProps> = {})

props.name: scrollY
props.description: Vertical scroll offset (lines to skip from top)

props.name: scrollX
props.description: Horizontal scroll offset (columns to skip from left)
